request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our civil defense gaps to target families like yours? While some politicians focus on partisan fights, our communities remain dangerously unprepared. We can't afford to wait - it's time to demand real investment in local emergency readiness. Your family's safety shouldn't be a political bargaining chip. #CommunitySafetyFirst #CivilDefenseNow
